title: CMD.REF.001.BEN.RESTORE_BENEFICIARY — Restore an archived beneficiary record
description: Payload of the RESTORE_BENEFICIARY command. Flips referential_status from ARCHIVED back to ACTIVE. Rare audited operation — typically reverses an archival applied in error. Emits one RVT.REF.001.BENEFICIARY_REFERENTIAL_UPDATED with transition_kind=RESTORED. Idempotent on command_id over a 30-day window.

comment.description: REQUIRED audit justification — restoration is rare and must always carry an operator/process note for the audit trail.
